name: Cous-Cous Tabbouleh
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Spring onions (scallions), peeled and chopped
1 can Red kidney beans or other beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cous-cous in about double its volume of boiling water until all the water is absorbed.
2. Peel and chop the tomatoes and onions.
3. Drain the sweetcorn and beans.
4. Mix everything together, season, and dress with lemon juice and optionally 1/2 tablespoon olive oil for flavor.
Do not turn off the heat. Press to complete the instructions.
